semantic.role: Issue template for collecting documentation improvement suggestions in the ArchSpine project
responsibilities: Provides a structured form for users to report which page needs work
Captures a description of the proposed change or missing content
Standardizes the submission of documentation-related feedback
outOfScope: Bug reports or feature requests unrelated to documentation
Code contributions or technical design discussions

English.purpose: This document defines a GitHub issue template used to gather and organize suggestions for improving the ArchSpine project’s documentation, including README, examples, and website copy. Its goal is to ensure that documentation improvement requests are clear, consistent, and actionable.
English.context_and_audience: Contributors, maintainers, and users of the ArchSpine mirror system who encounter unclear, missing, or incorrect documentation. The template helps them submit a focused request that can be easily triaged by the project team.
key_takeaways: The template requires a specific page link and a description of the change, making it easy to pinpoint the issue.
It covers all documentation assets (README, examples, website copy) under a single, clear label.
By enforcing a structured format, the template reduces ambiguity and speeds up the review process for documentation updates.
